author: cardinia
body: Added smuon particle data for charged LLP search targeting summer/fall conference, more details in PR on the [EXO PAG gtilab](https://gitlab.cern.ch/cms-exo-mci/EXO-MCsampleRequests/-/merge_requests/434) and in presentation at [EXO MC&I](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1679059/#4-displaced-dimuon-2024)
title: Smuon particle for charged LLP search
